## Licensing

By opening this pull request, I confirm I have the right to contribute this
material, and unless a license is set explicitly in `resource.yml`,
`course.yml`, or an asset's `.meta.yml` sidecar, I agree to license it under
the repository default, **CC-BY-SA-4.0**. To host without offering it for
reuse, set `license: none` instead — see `CONTRIBUTING.md` for details.
